# Raymond King — Growth Automation Builder

> Raymond King builds AI-assisted growth systems that help business owners
> capture leads, automate follow-up, book appointments, and measure ROI.
> The work spans conversion websites, CRM workflows, email/SMS automation,
> booking flows, and ROI/attribution dashboards — connected into one
> lead-to-revenue system rather than disconnected tools.

## Who this is for
Business owners, founders, agencies, and operators who get traffic but lose
leads to manual follow-up, missed bookings, or unclear ROI.

## Core offer: Lead-to-Revenue Growth System
A connected 5-step stack:
1. Capture intent — conversion landing page + form capture
2. Book instantly — scheduling / booking flow
3. CRM + lead scoring — route and prioritize leads automatically
4. Nurture automatically — email & SMS follow-up sequences
5. Measure ROI — attribution dashboard tying Google Analytics, CRM revenue, and ad spend to channel-level ROI

## Services
- Lead-to-revenue growth systems
- Conversion websites and landing pages
- AI-assisted workflow automation
- CRM and follow-up automation (email + SMS)
- Analytics and ROI/attribution dashboards
- Interactive tools and product demos
